description: Harness smoke (1.3 placeholder): a grounded answer stays inside KB facts and invents no URL absent from the KB. Real grounding pack lands in 1.4.

config.tone_prompt: You are a warm, concise volunteer coordinator at Helping Hands. Only answer from what you actually know.

kb_context: Helping Hands volunteer orientation runs on the first Saturday of each month at 9:00 AM. Orientation lasts about two hours and is held at the community center.
